prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its portrait composition, camera angle, subject identity, seated pose, clothing, lighting, and background. The first frame shows a young East Asian man sitting casually on transparent green-tinted glass stairs in a modern urban architectural space. He faces the camera from the center of the frame with a calm, neutral expression. He has short black hair with bangs and a clean-shaven face. He wears a white crew-neck t-shirt with blue graphic text on the front, black shorts, and black canvas sneakers with white laces and white soles. His legs are spread naturally on different glass steps, both arms rest loosely on his knees, and his hands hang relaxed in front of him. Around him are clear glass stair treads, glass railings, metal handrails, reflections on the glass panels, tall city buildings, and a bright overcast sky with soft diffused daylight. In the video, the man first remains seated in the same relaxed pose and looks toward the camera. After a brief pause, he leans forward slightly, shifts his weight onto his feet, and stands up smoothly from the glass step in a natural motion. Once standing, he faces the camera, slightly softens his expression, raises his right hand, and waves hello in a casual friendly gesture. He holds the wave briefly, then gently lowers his hand while continuing to look at the camera. Keep the camera static, preserve the same portrait framing, and maintain stable facial identity, white t-shirt text, black shorts, black sneakers, glass stairs, glass railings, city buildings, reflections, overcast lighting, and spatial consistency throughout the motion.
